message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Scientific Use File Establishment Panel of West German Graduates 1989 (SUF BAP 1989)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13512","justification":"Includes higher education graduates from West Germany (including North Rhine-Westphalia) around the end of the 1980s; focuses on employment, transition from higher education into the labor market, and further training."},{"title":"Microcensus 1989 - Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13540","justification":"German Microcensus provides regional identifiers down to federal states, allowing extraction of records for North Rhine-Westphalia in 1989; contains detailed information on employment status, vocational education, higher education, and family status/household composition."},{"title":"Microcensus 1987 - Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13538","justification":"National survey with state-level identifiers, covering North Rhine-Westphalia; includes labor market participation, vocational and higher education attainment, and family characteristics in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Microcensus 1985 - Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13536","justification":"Provides mid-1980s data for Germany with indicators on employment, vocational and academic qualifications, and family situation; North Rhine-Westphalia can be separated via regional codes."},{"title":"Microcensus 1983 - Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13534","justification":"Early-1980s microdata containing employment, education (including vocational and higher), and household/family indicators; state-level information allows analysis for North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"Microcensus 1981 - Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13532","justification":"Covers employment status, occupation, vocational training, school and higher education, and family composition at the beginning of the 1980s; federal state identifiers permit focusing on North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1988 (German General Social Survey 1988)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13504","justification":"General Social Survey for West Germany with variables on employment, education, family life, and social conditions; includes region variables that can be used to analyze respondents from North Rhine-Westphalia within the 1980s context."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1986 (German General Social Survey 1986)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13502","justification":"Contains questions on employment, vocational training, educational attainment, family life, and social indicators; can be subset to West German regions including North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1984 (German General Social Survey 1984)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13500","justification":"Mid-1980s survey of the West German population on social conditions, employment, and education, plus family-related items; regional information enables analysis related to North Rhine-Westphalia."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1982 (German General Social Survey 1982)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13498","justification":"Early-1980s social survey including labor market position, vocational and educational background, and family/marital status; regional coding can distinguish respondents in North Rhine-Westphalia."}]}
